bullets: Material quality: PU material. The bottom width of the ring: 1.5mm/3mm/4mm/5mm or above. Never have to worry about scratching your ring. The ring guards for women loose rings are too soft to be noticed.

Perfect solution: The innovative design based on spiral loading provides durable adhesion for most rings. Easily around the back of any ring belt. The ring spacer is suitable for rings within 7mm (0.3in) (not suitable for rings more than 7mm or 0.3in).
Size: 10cm/4 inch for each. Each item can be divided into 7-10 pieces. Rotating loading,The ring guards no adhesives, chemicals or fasteners.
Easy to clean: Easily wipe off the dirt and oil. Prevent water conservation and accumulation of pollutants. More comfortable than other size controller.
Easy to use: Has the advantages of wear resistance, oil resistance, transparency and elasticity. It is easy to use, and it will not fall off whenever the ring is dropped.

B07TBN9JRJ.description: Transform your everyday style with this women’s and mens tennis bracelet, crafted with brilliant 3mm cubic zirconia and finished in luxurious 14K gold plating. Available in 6.5", 7", and 7.5" sizes, this cz bracelet offers the perfect fit for all, whether you're after a classic tennis braclet or a trendy twist on 14K gold plated tennis bracelet. Designed for both sparkle and comfort, it’s the ideal gift that blends the elegance of women's tennis bracelets with the boldness of a tennis bracelet men can rock. Perfect for layering or wearing solo, this tennis bracelet gold piece is a must-have among cz tennis bracelets for women.

B0BRPYH71T.description: Specification: Chain Name: Jewlpire Sterling Silver Chain for Women. Chain Material: 925 Sterling Silver plated. Chain Color: Silver . Chain Style: 1.1MM Cable Chain. Chain Clasp: Lobster. Why choose the Jewlpire sterling silver chain? Package contents. ◈ Sterling Silver Chain for Women *1. ◈ Nice packaging*1. This silver chain makes for a great item for mom, daughter, wife, grandma, sister, friend, or yourself. Stylish way to wear ◈ Can be worn layered. ◈ Can be alone. ◈ Can be with pendant, tag or ring. ◈ Perfect for daily wear. ◈ A great piece to add to every outfit. Silver chain for women with 5 advantages ◈1. No color fading or turning green or another color. ◈2. Abrasion resistant. ◈3. Sweat-proof, easy to maintenance. ◈4. Not easily tangled together. ◈5. No hair pinching, comfortable to wear.
